zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Livengood於1743年6月11日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普希霍斯時，她的父親Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr46歲，母親Anna Margretha Sands44歲。她於大約1762年與Michael Franks Jr.結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1790年在美國賓夕法尼亞州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Livengood于1743年6月11日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普希霍斯时，她的父亲Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr46岁，母亲Anna Margretha Sands44岁。她于大约1762年与Michael Franks Jr.结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1790年在美国宾夕法尼亚州法也特赫爾曼 堂史普享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Livengood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Leibengut or perhaps Liebengut (see Levengood ).

variants.name: Levengood
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German Leibengut, itself a variant of Leibundgut, a status name for a person bonded to an ecclesiastical estate, from Middle High German līp ‘life’, ‘body’ + und ‘and’ + guot ‘goods, possessions’. The surname Leibengut has apparently died out in Switzerland; today a few bearers are found in France, only. Compare Libengood , Livengood , Livergood , Livingood , and Lovingood .

Alternatively, but less likely, an Americanized form of Swiss German Liebengut: nickname meaning ‘dear and good’ (lieb und gut). The surname Liebengut is not found in Switzerland or elsewhere in Europe.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

historicEvents.title: The First Constitution
historicEvents.description: Serving the newly created United States of America as the first constitution, the Articles of Confederation were an agreement among the 13 original states preserving the independence and sovereignty of the states. But with a limited central government, the Constitutional Convention came together to replace the Articles of Confederation with a more established Constitution and central government on where the states can be represented and voice their concerns and comments to build up the nation.
Historical Boundaries 1783: Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Livengood was born on 11 June 1743, in Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States, her father, Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr, was 46 and her mother, Anna Margretha Sands, was 44. She married Michael Franks Jr. about 1762. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1790, in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Livengood est née le 11 juin 1743, à Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anna Margretha Sands, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Michael Franks Jr. environ 1762. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1790, à German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Livengood am 11. Juni 1743 in Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr 46 und ihre Mutter Anna Margretha Sands 44. Sie hat um 1762 Michael Franks Jr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1790 im Alter von 47 Jahren in German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Livengood è nata il il 11 giugno 1743 nel Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Anna Margretha Sands, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Michael Franks Jr. circa 1762. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1790, nel German Township, Fayette, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Livengoodが1743年6月11日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップヒグhハウゼで生まれた時，父Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jrは46歳，母Anna Margretha Sandsは44歳であった。約1762年にMichael Franks Jr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1790年にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ファイエットジャーマン トウンシュイップで47歳で死去した。

ko.Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pen: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프 히그h하스

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Livengood(이)가 1743년 6월 11일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프 히그h하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Margretha Sands(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1762년 Michael Franks Jr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1790년 미국 펜실베이니아 주 파예트 그먼 타운시프에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Livengood nasceu em 11 de junho de 1743, em Highhouse, German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margretha Sands, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Michael Franks Jr. aproximadamente 1762. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1790, em German Township, Fayette, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Livengood родилась 11 июня 1743 г. в местности хаихоус, джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Hans Jacob Liebenguth Jr было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Margretha Sands, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Michael Franks Jr. около 1762 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1790 г. в местности джирман тоуншип, феиетт, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 47 лет.

Se casó con Michael Franks Jr. aproximadamente 1762. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1790, en German Township, Fayette, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 47 años.
